service: greenlens-backend

#frameworkVersion: '3'

provider:
  name: aws
  runtime: dotnet8
  region: us-east-1
  stage: ${opt:stage, 'dev'}
  environment:
    USER_PROGRESS_TABLE: !Ref UserProgressTable
    SNS_TOPIC_ARN: !Ref StreakNotificationTopic
    QUESTION_TABLE: !Ref QuizQuestionsTable
    BEDROCK_MODEL_ID: anthropic.claude-3-sonnet-20240229-v1:0
    COGNITO_USER_POOL_ID: !Ref CognitoUserPool
    COGNITO_CLIENT_ID: !Ref CognitoUserPoolClient
  iam:
    role:
      statements:
        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - logs:CreateLogGroup
            - logs:CreateLogStream
            - logs:PutLogEvents
          Resource: arn:aws:logs:${aws:region}:${aws:accountId}:log-group:/aws/lambda/*

        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - dynamodb:GetItem
            - dynamodb:PutItem
            - dynamodb:UpdateItem
            - dynamodb:DeleteItem
            - dynamodb:Query
            - dynamodb:Scan
          Resource:
            - !GetAtt UserProgressTable.Arn
            - !GetAtt QuizQuestionsTable.Arn

        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - rekognition:DetectLabels
          Resource: '*'

        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - bedrock:InvokeModel
          Resource: '*'

        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - sns:Publish
          Resource: !Ref StreakNotificationTopic

        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - s3:GetObject
            - s3:ListBucket
          Resource:
            - !GetAtt GreenLensImagesBucket.Arn
            - !Sub ${GreenLensImagesBucket.Arn}/*

functions:
  PostConfirmation:
    handler: GreenLens.Api::GreenLens.Api.PostConfirmationHandler::FunctionHandler
    events:
      - cognitoUserPool:
          pool: !Ref CognitoUserPool
          trigger: PostConfirmation

  ProcessImage:
    handler: GreenLens.Api::GreenLens.Api.ProcessImageHandler::FunctionHandler
    events:
      - s3:
          bucket: greenlens-images
          event: s3:ObjectCreated:*

  SubmitQuiz:
    handler: GreenLens.Api::GreenLens.Api.SubmitQuizHandler::FunctionHandler
    events:
      - http:
          path: submit-quiz
          method: post

resources:
  Resources:
    GreenLensImagesBucket:
      Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
      Properties:
        BucketName: greenlens-images

    UserProgressTable:
      Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
      Properties:
        TableName: UserProgress
        BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST
        AttributeDefinitions:
          - AttributeName: userId
            AttributeType: S
        KeySchema:
          - AttributeName: userId
            KeyType: HASH

    QuizQuestionsTable:
      Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
      Properties:
        TableName: QuizQuestions
        BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST
        AttributeDefinitions:
          - AttributeName: questionId
            AttributeType: S
        KeySchema:
          - AttributeName: questionId
            KeyType: HASH

    CognitoUserPool:
      Type: AWS::Cognito::UserPool
      Properties:
        UserPoolName: greenlens-user-pool
        AutoVerifiedAttributes:
          - email

    CognitoUserPoolClient:
      Type: AWS::Cognito::UserPoolClient
      Properties:
        ClientName: greenlens-user-pool-client
        UserPoolId: !Ref CognitoUserPool
        GenerateSecret: false
        ExplicitAuthFlows:
          - ALLOW_USER_PASSWORD_AUTH
          - ALLOW_REFRESH_TOKEN_AUTH
          - ALLOW_USER_SRP_AUTH

    StreakNotificationTopic:
      Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
      Properties:
        TopicName: StreakNotificationTopic

  Outputs:
    GreenLensImagesBucketName:
      Description: S3 bucket for uploaded images
      Value: !Ref GreenLensImagesBucket

    UserProgressTableName:
      Description: DynamoDB table for user progress
      Value: !Ref UserProgressTable

    QuizQuestionsTableName:
      Description: DynamoDB table for generated quiz questions
      Value: !Ref QuizQuestionsTable

    CognitoUserPoolId:
      Description: Cognito User Pool identifier
      Value: !Ref CognitoUserPool

    CognitoUserPoolClientId:
      Description: Cognito User Pool client identifier
      Value: !Ref CognitoUserPoolClient

    StreakNotificationTopicArn:
      Description: SNS topic used for streak notifications
      Value: !Ref StreakNotificationTopic
